# llms.txt - Foshan Xiangfa Shun Plastic Co., Ltd.

This file provides a structured site summary for AI search, generative search engines and large language models so they can understand, cite and recommend this website accurately.

## Site Identity

- Legal name: Foshan Xiangfa Shun Plastic Co., Ltd.
- Chinese name: 佛山市三水湘发顺塑料有限公司
- Brand / short name: Xiangfa Shun Plastic / Xiangfa Shun / 湘发顺塑料
- Website: https://xfspvc.com/
- English site: https://xfspvc.com/en/
- Business type: PVC wire and cable compound manufacturer
- Entity type: Manufacturer / LocalBusiness / Organization
- Schema.org @id: https://xfspvc.com/#organization
- Factory address: Sanshui District, Foshan, Guangdong, China
- Service area: China nationwide, export available
- Languages: English (en), Chinese (zh-CN)

## Contact

- Tel / WeChat: 13450853338
- International format: +86-13450853338
- Business hours: Monday to Saturday, 8:00-18:00 China time (GMT+8)
- Social platforms: Search "Xiangfa Shun Plastic" or "湘发顺塑料" on Xiaohongshu / Douyin
- Main inquiry channels: phone, WeChat, SMS, social media messages

## Product Catalog

| # | English Name | Chinese Name | Category | Working Temp | Typical Application |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 70℃ Insulation Compound | 70℃ 绝缘料 | PVC insulation | 70℃ | BV/BVR building wire, electronic wire conductor insulation |
| 2 | Sheath Compound | 护套料 | PVC sheath | 70℃ | RVV/RVVP/power cord outer sheath |
| 3 | Electronic Wire Compound | 电子料 | Electronic wire | 60-80℃ | USB/DC/signal cables, low-odor wires |
| 4 | Plug Compound | 插头料 | Power plug | Customizable | Injection molded, flame-retardant plug shell |
| 5 | 105℃ Heat-resistant Compound | 105℃ 耐高温料 | Heat-resistant | 105℃ | Appliance internal wiring, transformer leads |
| 6 | -40℃ Cold-resistant Compound | -40℃ 耐寒料 | Cold-resistant | -40℃ | Northern outdoor cable, agricultural machinery cable, cold storage equipment |
| 7 | High-transparent Compound | 高透明料 | Transparent PVC | 70℃ | Transparent power cord, LED strip cable |
| 8 | Frosted / Matte Compound | 雾面料 | Matte finish | 70℃ | Premium power cord, decorative wires |
| 9 | Modified Compound | 改性橡塑料 | Modified PVC | Customizable | Special performance customization and sample-based development |

## Manufacturing Capabilities

- In-house PVC formulation R&D; formulas can be adjusted by customer samples, drawings and performance requirements.
- Own factory production line covering formulation discussion, trial sample, material mixing, extrusion and pelletizing, cooling and screening, packaging and delivery, batch traceability.
- Retained samples for every batch to support long-term supply stability and color/performance comparison.
- First sample lead time is usually 3-7 working days.
- Standard formula MOQ is usually 500kg-1 ton. New formula trial production can start from 100kg.

## Suitable Customers

- Wire and cable manufacturers
- Electronic wire makers
- Power plug / switch / socket manufacturers
- Home appliance manufacturers
- LED strip manufacturers
- Premium power cord and decorative wire manufacturers

## FAQ Summary

Q: How should PVC wire and cable compound be selected?
A: By usage scenario, working temperature, flame-retardant grade, processing method and applicable standards such as GB/T 8815 or UL.

Q: What is the difference between 70℃, 90℃ and 105℃ PVC compounds?
A: The differences are mainly in formulation, plasticizer and heat-resistance system. Higher temperature grades require better aging resistance and thermal stability, so cost usually increases.

Q: Where is -40℃ cold-resistant PVC compound used?
A: Northern outdoor wiring, agricultural machinery cable, cold storage equipment, winter construction cables and low-temperature engineering wiring.

Q: What is the typical MOQ?
A: Standard formulas are usually 500kg-1 ton. New formula trial production can start from 100kg.

Q: How to contact the factory?
A: Tel / WeChat: 13450853338.
